data.eyebrow: For dogs with itchy, gunky ears that keep coming back
data.headline: 5 Reasons Dog Owners Are Switching to Good For Pets for Their Dog's Ears
data.subheadline: If your dog scratches at gunky, smelly ears no matter how often you clean them, the answer probably isn't in the ear at all. It's in the gut.

data.headline: Owners are seeing the difference in weeks, not years

reviews.quote: My dog was on the baked chews but saw the advert saying non-baked chews are better. She was still having itchy ears on the baked chews. Two and a half weeks on these and the difference is already massive. Since I adopted her in 2018 I've spent so much on steroids, ear drops and ear cleaning at the vet. Her ears are now practically clean and there's no itching at all.
reviews.author: Katie S.

reviews.quote: I started these on the 24th January 2025 and today I actually saw a difference, no more paw licking or chewing. I cleaned her ears out today and nothing in there either. A much more relaxed and happy dog, thank you.
reviews.author: Julie C.

data.heading: 1. It works on more than just the ears
paragraphs: Gunky ears rarely travel alone. The same dog usually licks its paws, scratches its skin, scoots across the carpet and has unsettled stools too.
That's because these aren't separate problems. They're often the same problem, showing up in different places, and it starts in the gut.
A big share of the immune system sits around the gut. The gut and skin are linked.
Calm the inside, and the outside follows. The ears, the paws, the skin, the stools.
One capsule. The whole picture.

data.heading: 2. It suits almost any dog, fussy or sensitive
data.body: From a small Beagle to a giant Mastiff, the dose is set by weight, so it works across every breed and size, daily, for the long term.

data.heading: 3. There's nothing to fight your dog over
paragraphs: No pilling. No hiding tablets in cheese. No wrestling a reluctant dog at the kitchen counter every single morning.
It's a sprinkle capsule. Twist it open.
Tip the contents straight onto their food and stir it through.
Even fussy dogs eat it without noticing. Start on half the daily dose for the first 5–7 days, then move up to the full amount by weight.

data.heading: 5. Thousands of owners have already made the switch
paragraphs: Real dogs.
Real owners.
Same problems as yours.
Here's what they wanted other owners to know.
The throughline is hard to ignore.

Chris's bulldog licked her paws bald and raw every summer for two and a half years. The vet route cost him £140 for two weeks and nothing worked. A week on these, and three weeks later, she'd stopped completely. He wrote: "I don't work for these guys, I just wanted to tell people."

Joanne's cockapoo chewed her paws and scratched her ears constantly. She was told to give it a few months. After 12 to 14 weeks the change was huge: the chewing stopped, and her ears went clean and healthy.
Nicola's old English Mastiff: a big difference to her ears, skin and paws in three weeks.

Elaine's Lab: "Her ears are the best they've been in ages, no more scooting or grass eating, and her eyes are clearer with less tear staining. She's full of energy again, like a younger version of herself."
Sherry's Pomeranian got his full coat back after a bad yeast issue.
The pattern is consistent.
Switchers who came off baked chews tell us the same thing: the chews barely helped, and these were another level.

That's the cold-filled difference. Most chews are baked, and heat kills the live bacteria. Moisture in the tub finishes them off. So you can pay for a big CFU number that's already dead before your dog ever eats it. Ours is cold-filled in a sealed capsule, heat and moisture free, so the cultures actually arrive alive.

And the value adds up. One tub lasts a smaller dog around 90 days, it's up to 54% cheaper per serving than our top 10 competitors for a 20kg dog, and it's far cheaper than the endless steroids, ear drops and repeat vet trips.
Christine halved her vet trips.
We won't scare you into buying.
We'd rather show you the label: five named strains, the exact CFU, made in the UK to GMP standards.
Backed by the vet who helped build it.
Dr Kishan Vara MRCVS co-developed the formula.
On record, he says daily probiotics and enzymes make a meaningful difference to a dog's digestion.
And when you help your dog, you help a dog in need: 51% of our profits go to UK animal welfare charities including the RSPCA, Dogs Trust and Guide Dogs.
20,000+ dogs helped in the last 12 months. 4,537+ verified reviews. A 90-day money-back guarantee.
That's not hype. That's just where the evidence points.

data.headline: Questions owners ask before they buy

items.q: How long until I see a difference in my dog's ears?
items.a: It varies by dog. Some owners notice firmer stools in the first week or two, while ear, skin and coat changes usually build over 8 to 12 weeks as the gut rebalances. The 90-day guarantee covers the wait.

No honest brand can promise a result for every dog, which is exactly why there's a 90-day money-back guarantee. What we can show you is 20,000+ dogs helped in the last year, 4,537+ verified reviews, and dogs with the exact same gunky-ear and paw-licking stories as yours. Different to baked chews, where the bacteria are often dead before your dog eats them.

items.q: How does the money-back guarantee work?
items.a: Try it for 90 days. If it's not right for your dog, get in touch and you get your money back. The risk sits with us, not you.

It was co-developed with practising UK vet Dr Kishan Vara MRCVS, who holds equity in the formula. It works alongside your own vet's care rather than replacing it. If your dog is under veterinary supervision, check with them first.

items.q: Can my older dog take it?
items.a: Yes. Senior dogs often benefit most from daily digestive and microbiome support. It's suitable from 12 weeks of age, but not for puppies under 12 weeks or pregnant and lactating dogs.

items.q: How fast does it arrive and what does delivery cost?
items.a: Every order ships free with 48-hour delivery.
We give 51% of our profits to UK animal welfare charities including the RSPCA, Dogs Trust and Guide Dogs. It's the model the business is built on. Helping your dog helps dogs in need.
It's a sprinkle capsule, not a tablet to swallow whole. Twist it open, mix the contents into food, once daily by weight. Start with half the daily dose for 5 to 7 days, then move to the full dose.

Yes, it has a natural chicken flavouring, which is what gets even fussy dogs eating it. It's free from grains and unhealthy fillers. If your dog has a diagnosed chicken allergy or another known sensitivity, get in touch before starting and we'll help you decide.

Five research-backed strains: Lactobacillus acidophilus, Lactobacillus rhamnosus, Lactobacillus brevis, Lactobacillus plantarum and Bifidobacterium lactis, at 5 billion live cultures per serving, plus chicory-root prebiotic to feed them and a digestive enzyme complex. All in a vegan capsule with no fillers or grains. The full label is printed on the pack, so you can check it against anything your dog reacts to.
